Sender: M. Murad, Le Contrôleur, Service des Antiquités, Direction Générale
Recipient: Monsieur Emile Baraize, Directeur de Travaux du Service des Antiquités, Louxor
Brief_Summary: M. Murad, the Controller of the Antiquities Service, writes to Monsieur Emile Baraize, Director of Works in Luxor, to send Aly El Chechai's three-year employment contract for renewal, requesting Baraize to have it signed by the employee and returned.
English_Translation:
SEE January 10, 1922.

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE
INSPECTORATE OF

SERVICE OF

N°

dreams will be
I had

Keep me
to our aug
the same,
Do, please
Your

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE.
GENERAL DIRECTORATE.

(Model N° 37 - [Arabic: Form No. 37]) Cairo, February 13, 1922

N° 1-2/16 SUBJECT:- Employment contract of Aly El Chechai
Attachments 2

[Handwritten: R.P.]

Mr. Director of Works,

The employment contract of Aly El Chechai needing to be renewed for a period of three years starting from next April 1st, I have the honor to send it to you herewith, asking you to have it signed by the interested party and to return it to me.

Please accept, Mr. Director of Works, the assurance of my distinguished consideration.

CC THE CONTROLLER,
[Handwritten signature: M. Murad]

Mr. Emile Baraize,
Director of Works
of the Antiquities Service,

Luxor

[Pencil note: 4. Accountant.]
[Pencil note: on 14/2/22]
[Pencil note: pasted]

Stamp: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS. DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE. CAIRE. 14 FEV 1922 1-P.M.

Handwritten Arabic: الحكومة المصرية (The Egyptian Government)
Handwritten Arabic: الحكومة المصرية (The Egyptian Government)
Confidence_Notes: The initial section 'Cher Col avoir ass...' appears to be a highly fragmented and incomplete text, possibly a draft or a remnant from another document, and is not coherently connected to the main letter. It has been translated literally despite its incompleteness.

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS.
DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE.

(Modèle N° 37 - [Handwritten Arabic: أورنيك نمرة ٣٧]) Le Caire, le 13 Février, 1922

N° 1-2/16 OBJET:- Contrat d'engagement de Aly
Pièces jointes 2 El Chechai

[Handwritten: R.P.]

Monsieur le Directeur de Travaux,

Le contrat d'engagement de Aly El Chéchai devant
être renouvelé, pour une période de trois ans à partir
du 1er Avril prochain, j'ai l'honneur de vous l'en-
voyer ci-joint en vous priant de le faire signer par
l'intéressé et de me le retourner.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur le Directeur de Travaux,
l'assurance de ma considération distinguée.

CC LE CONTROLEUR,
[Handwritten signature: M. Murad]

[Stamp: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS. DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE. CAIRE. 14 FEV 1922 1-P.M.]
[Stamp: SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS. DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE. CAIRE. 14 FEV 1922 1-P.M.]
[Stamp: ANTIQUITIES DEPARTMENT. CAIRO OFFICE. 14 FEV 1922]
[Handwritten Arabic: الحكومة المصرية]
[Handwritten Arabic: الحكومة المصرية]

Monsieur Emile Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux
du Service des Antiquités,

Louxor

[Pencil note: 4. Comptable.]
[Pencil note: le 14/2/22]
[Pencil note: collé]
